$description: Structured decision records. See /skills/decisions.md for format and rules.

entries.title: Adopt AI Design Playbook structure
entries.rationale: Codebase as single source of truth eliminates the Figma-to-code translation layer. Skill files persist context across Claude sessions; tokens.css enforces consistency at the system level rather than per-component.
alternatives: Keep Figma + manual handoff (slower feedback loop, two sources of truth)
Storybook-only system (no canvas/prototype layer for testing user flows)

entries.title: Placeholder color primitives — replace before first flow
entries.rationale: Initial brand palette uses Tailwind/Zinc neutrals + Indigo as a generic-but-WCAG-passing baseline. Real product identity must replace these before any user-facing screens are built; the token-level a11y audit must be re-run after.

entries.title: Map --color-action-danger to danger-600 (not 500) for AA contrast
entries.rationale: White text on danger-500 (#EF4444) yielded 3.76:1 in `npm run tokens:audit` — fails WCAG AA for normal text. danger-600 (#DC2626) yields 4.83:1 and passes. Hover state moved to danger-500 for the brighter feedback. Fixed at the semantic layer; primitives unchanged.
alternatives: Darken danger-500 primitive (would shift the whole red ramp)
Bump headers-only AAA target instead of fixing the action color (cheating)
